items.title: [正面] Slay the Spire-inspired card battler roguelike; th...
items.summary:
Slay the Spire-inspired card battler roguelike; the team-building and character-focused gacha mechanics actually manage to improve on the core STS gameplay for me, and the art style and setting are very cool. If a proper english translation comes out (right now there is only LLM translation) it will be my fave gacha

Edit: They fixed the core translation issues and it is now my favorite gacha
